name: Tellius AI Analytics API
what_it_does: Tellius AI-driven analytics REST API for natural language query, automated insight generation, and decision intelligence. Enables AI agents to manage natural language question-to-SQL analytics for business user query automation, handle automated anomaly detection and root cause analysis for business performance monitoring, access AI-powered insight generation and key driver analysis for automated analytics narration, retrieve predictive analytics and forecasting for business intelligence automation, manage data source connection and dataset management for analytics infrastructure, handle embedded analytics and white-label dashboard creation for application integration, access user query history and analytics usage analytics for platform optimization, retrieve cohort analysis and segmentation for customer analytics automation, manage scheduled insight delivery and alert automation for proactive analytics, and integrate Tellius with cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift) for direct query analytics.
use_cases: Answering business questions from NLQ analytics agents
Detecting anomalies from business monitoring agents
Generating automated insights from analytics narration agents
Embedding analytics from application development agents
not_for: Heavy-lift ETL and data pipeline management
Organizations without cloud data warehouse infrastructure
Use cases requiring real-time streaming analytics
best_when: An enterprise or analytics team wants AI agents to automate natural language query, anomaly detection, insight generation, and embedded analytics using Tellius connected to cloud data warehouses.
avoid_when: AI INSIGHT ACCURACY RISK: Automated insight generation and root cause analysis from Tellius AI must be validated before business decisions; AI-generated explanations for business metric changes can identify spurious correlations as causal drivers; human analyst review required for strategic decisions. NLQ hallucination risk — natural language query translation to SQL can generate incorrect queries for ambiguous business questions; automated analytics pipelines must validate query results before distribution. Data governance — automated query access to enterprise data warehouses via Tellius must implement row-level security and column masking; unrestricted NLQ access to sensitive financial or HR data creates data governance violations.

auth.notes: Tellius uses API key and OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Documentation at docs.tellius.com. San Jose, California HQ. Founded 2016. Private (Emergent Ventures, Falcon Edge Capital). AI-first search and decision intelligence analytics. 200+ enterprise customers. Competes with ThoughtSpot, Yellowfin Signals, and Sisense for AI-driven analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial; limited dataset size and users
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-user and per-data volume pricing
pricing.notes: San Jose, California. Founded 2016. Emergent Ventures/Falcon Edge-backed. 200+ enterprise customers. AI search analytics. Competes with ThoughtSpot and Sisense.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; NLQ processing is async for complex queries

known_agent_gotchas: AI INSIGHT HALLUCINATION: NLQ query translation and AI-generated root cause analysis can identify spurious correlations as causal drivers; automated business decisions based on Tellius AI insights require analyst validation before strategic action

NLQ SQL accuracy — natural language to SQL translation is unreliable for ambiguous business terminology; automated analytics pipelines must validate query results and SQL generated before distribution

Row-level security configuration — Tellius NLQ access must implement data warehouse row-level security to prevent unauthorized data access; unrestricted NLQ query generation can expose sensitive data to unauthorized users
Async processing for complex queries — AI insight generation for large datasets is asynchronous and can take minutes; implement webhook callbacks or status polling for complex insight requests
Data warehouse direct query dependency — Tellius performance is dependent on underlying data warehouse query performance; slow Snowflake/BigQuery queries create Tellius timeout and latency issues
Early-stage startup risk — Tellius is a relatively small AI analytics startup; API stability and product roadmap should be validated for long-term integration dependencies
agent_readiness.security_notes: AI analytics. SOC2. API key/OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU. Business analytics and data warehouse query data.

security_score_components.security_notes: AI analytics. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU. Business analytics data.
